eventInfo:
Orange Dirt Trail Series - Stillwater, OK

Saturday, October 17, 2026 • Lake McMurtry East Pavilion

Address:
29180 Chisholm Curve
Stillwater, OK 74075

Join Us for the Orange Dirt Trail Series!

Join us for the Orange Dirt Trail Series in sunny Stillwater, OK! Spend the morning on the trails and in the trees, then cheer on other finishers while you enjoy a beverage and snacks at our post-race celebration. Run, walk, or just come hang — we can't wait to see you out at the lake!

Distances

  • 5K
  • 10K
  • Half Marathon
  • Marathon

Registration Fees

  • 5K: $40
  • 10K: $50
  • Half Marathon: $60
  • Marathon: $70

Registration includes: finisher's medal + post-race refreshments.
Register by September 30, 2026 to guarantee an event t-shirt in your size.

Packet Pickup

Friday, October 16
5:00 PM – 8:00 PM
Stonecloud Stillwater Patio & Taproom
917 S Husband St, Stillwater, OK 74074

Saturday, October 17 (Race Day)
5:30 AM until 15 minutes before your distance start time
Lake McMurtry East Pavilion

Start Times

  • 7:00 AM – Marathon
  • 7:30 AM – Half Marathon
  • 8:00 AM – 10K
  • 8:30 AM – 5K

Course Description

All distances start and finish near the Lake McMurtry East Pavilion. Courses are out-and-back using the Yellow, Red, Blue, and/or Green Trails.

  • 5K: Yellow Trail
  • 10K: Yellow Trail
  • Half Marathon: Yellow + Red Trail
  • Marathon: Yellow + Red + Green + Blue Trail

Final course maps with aid station locations will be emailed the Monday before race weekend.

Timing & Bib Instructions

The event will be chip-timed. Please wear your bib on the front of your body.

Post-Race Celebration

Race participants are encouraged to stay and enjoy food, drinks, and good company after their run.

Awards

All participants receive a finisher’s medal. Awards will be given to the top three finishers in Female, Non-binary, and Male categories for each distance. Winners must pick up their awards on-site.

Accommodations

Stillwater offers many lodging options. Camping is available at Lake McMurtry (private and primitive sites). Primitive camping will be available near the East Pavilion on Friday, October 16. Reservations required — call (405) 747-8085 and mention the Orange Dirt Trail Series.

Register now and join us on the trails!
